name: EIMI Dynamic Fix
description: EIMI Dynamic Fix is a light and flexible hold hairspray that enables you to shape and sculpt distinctive hairstyles.

name: EIMI Curl Shaper
description: HOLD LEVEL 2 Get polished definition, control and bouncy curls with EIMI Curls Shaper a curl enhancing gel-cream.

name: EIMI Fresh Up
description: A weightless mist to refresh and reactivate curls on dry or slightly damp hair. Simply mist and scrunch for instant definition without needing a full wash. Ideal as an on‑the‑go curl pick‑me‑up.

name: EIMI Grip Cream
description: Warm a small amount between fingertips and apply to dry hair from mid-lengths to ends. Tames, defines, and sculpts texture. Ideal for piecey, defined styles or natural tousled looks

name: EIMI Ocean Spritz
description: HOLD LEVEL 2 Create undone beachy texture with EIMI Ocean Spritz, a natural mineral salt spray that helps protect hair against dehydration and UV damage.

name: EIMI Rugged Texture
description: HOLD LEVEL 3 Texturise your look with EIMI Rugged Texture, a matte paste created to give your hair a rugged effect with strong definition.

name: EIMI Pearl Styler
description: HOLD LEVEL 3 Create strong flexible hold and teasable texture with pearl gloss shine with EIMI Pearl Shiner. This styling hair gel is formulated to help protect hair from the effects of UV.

name: EIMI Shape Me
description: Warm a small amount between fingertips and apply to dry hair from mid-lengths to ends. Tames, defines, and sculpts texture. Ideal for piecey, defined styles or natural tousled looks

name: EIMI Shape Shift
description: Warm a generous amount between fingers and work through dry or towel-dried hair to shape definitions or tousle textured styles

name: EIMI Boost Bounce
description: A curl-enhancing salon-grade mousse for creative curly styles; apply on damp hair then air-dry or diffuse to define curls with volume, soft movement, and long-lasting shape.

name: EIMI Dry Me
description: HOLD LEVEL 1 Achieve your look with Dry Me, a dry shampoo that creates volume and a manageable matte texture. The dry shampoo's formula with tapioca starch refreshes your hair and absorbs oil.

name: EIMI Extra Volume
description: HOLD LEVEL 3 The EIMI Extra Volume gives any blow dry head-turning volume and perfect body with strong hold.This strong hold volumizing mousse is formulated to help protect your hair against dehydration whilst blow drying.

name: EIMI Natural Volume
description: Lightweight styling mousse designed to deliver subtle lift and airy texture. Designed to enhance volume gently without stiffness. Best for styles needing natural movement.

name: EIMI Perfect Setting
description: Apply evenly on damp hair, roll your hair around a brush in sections and blow-dry to build structure, shine, and volume.

name: EIMI Root Shoot
description: A precision mousse applied directly to damp hair at the roots, then combed through and blow‑dried to build lift and body from the scalp. Creates visible root volume while remaining lightweight.

name: EIMI Shape Control
description: A salon-grade mousse that sets style with extra firm support; applied to damp hair then blow‑dried for volume and resilience in shape

name: EIMI Sugar Lift
description: HOLD LEVEL 3 Get a grip on volume: the EIMI Sugar Lift is a rich, flexible spray infused with sugar that provides lift, shine and touchable grippy texture.

name: EIMI Smooth Thermal Image
description: HOLD LEVEL 2 Our EIMI Thermal Image 2-phase spray helps protect your hair whilst using hot tools. Phase 1 is formulated to nourish the hair and protect it from heat up to 220°C. Phase 2 smoothens your hair for a flawless shiny result.

name: EIMI Smooth Flowing Form
description: HOLD LEVEL 2 EIMI Flowing Form is a smoothing hair balm that creates luxurious smoothness with flexible control and natural movement. The balm is formulated to reduce frizz and help protect your hair against dehydration whilst using hot tools.

name: EIMI Smooth Perfect Me
description: HOLD LEVEL 1 EIMI Perfect Me is a delicate lotion that adds shine, helps repair, moisturizes and tames flyaways. This smoothing lotion also protects the hair from the heat of styling tools.

name: EIMI Just Brilliant
description: A shine pomade offering defined smoothness—apply a small amount to palms, glide through hair to control frizz and boost shine. Works well on dry or slightly damp hair.

name: EIMI Sculpt Force
description: Apply to dry hair to shape immediately or on damp hair for wet-look. Fast-drying formula lets you sculpt precise styles with long-lasting hold and intensive shine.

name: Invigo Sun Shampoo
description: Hydrating shampoo infused with pro-vitamin B5 for after-sun exposure. Cleanses while maintaining moisture and shine.
